label: The Ashlight Canteen
description: The Ashlight Canteen stands as a low, basalt-block taproom sealed behind double pressure-doors and thick gasketed shutters against Vespera Tertius’ ash-laden winds. Its interior is defined by soot-dark timber, riveted sheet-metal bulkheads, and a long scarred counter fitted with spill gutters and drain grates for easy washdown. Violet-glass lanterns cast bruise-colored light that echoes the world’s auroral glare, while ceiling baffles and grounded chains temper the constant electrostatic charge. A wall of caged vox-receivers hisses with the planet’s endemic interference, reducing distant news to clipped, corrupted fragments.
